overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a futuristic city street at dusk toward the 'Heavy Hearts Club' nightclub, ascending the illuminated entrance stairs, and entering the neon-lit interior with laser shows and crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with nightclub entrance

events.description: slowing approach while navigating past parked vehicles
black limousine temporarily blocks view of entrance stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the futuristic city street toward the club entrance, passing neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: large green neon cursive sign reading 'Heavy Hearts Club' mounted on building facade
sleek black six-wheeled limousine with neon underglow and chrome details
bright orange futuristic sports car with angular design parked at curb
glass and metal entrance structure with integrated green lighting panels
tall skyscraper with vertical neon strip lighting visible in background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic cyberpunk city street at dusk, approaching the 'Heavy Hearts Club' with its prominent green neon signage. The player passes parked futuristic vehicles including a black limousine and orange sports car, while the street is lined with modern glass architecture and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated entrance staircase with cactus landscaping

events.description: moving from open street to covered entrance canopy area
beginning ascent of wide illuminated staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide illuminated staircase leading to the club entrance, passing security personnel

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit standing near the top of the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with integrated cyan lighting strips and metal railings
raised planters containing tall saguaro cacti and desert vegetation
stainless steel handrails with horizontal bars along staircase edges

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide illuminated staircase leading to the club entrance, moving from the open street into the covered canopy area. The stairs are lined with cactus planters and metal railings, while the green neon club sign remains visible overhead.

events.description: entering building through automatic sliding glass doors
interior lighting shifts from green neon to warm amber tones

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance lobby toward the inner club doors, passing security checkpoint

notable_agents.action: security guard in tactical gear monitoring the entrance area

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with gold triangular decals and chrome frames
reception counter with red rope barrier and metallic finish
large double doors leading to main club area with small rectangular windows
angular gold light fixtures mounted on lobby walls

segments.scene_description: Entering the club through automatic glass doors into a lobby with polished marble floors and warm amber lighting. The space features a security desk with red ropes and angular gold light fixtures, transitioning from the cyberpunk exterior to an upscale interior environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub main floor with bar and laser show

events.description: entering main nightclub area from lobby
green laser beams activate overhead illuminating the dance floor
turning right to move along the bar counter

agents.ego_description: moving through the crowded nightclub, observing the laser light show and bar area

notable_agents.action: bartender serving drinks behind the illuminated bar counter

entered.detail: long illuminated bar with yellow underlighting and bottles arranged on shelves
green laser beams projecting from ceiling with 'Heavy Hearts' text visible in light
tall pillars with golden lighting and Art Deco styling
ring-shaped hanging light fixtures with warm illumination
elevated platform with equipment and operator visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving through the main nightclub interior filled with dense crowds socializing and dancing. Green laser beams project overhead spelling 'Heavy Hearts' while the illuminated bar stretches along the right side. Egyptian-revival columns and circular chandeliers rise in the background, creating an upscale lounge atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling cyberpunk street at dusk into the opulent, neon-lit interior of an upscale nightclub. It begins by moving past futuristic vehicles and glass architecture toward the prominent green neon signage of the Heavy Hearts Club. As the camera reaches the venue, it ascends a wide, illuminated staircase lined with cactus planters, moving from the open city air beneath a covered canopy. The scene then shifts through automatic glass doors into a polished marble lobby with warm amber lighting and gold fixtures before pushing forward into the main club. Finally, the environment opens into a dense, socializing crowd beneath green laser beams and circular chandeliers, with an illuminated bar stretching along the side of the lounge.
